Title: xProfile - createOrganization Mutation Validates Org Name (InputValidationOptions)
Preconditions: BROWSER-ONLY: Execute in GraphiQL UI ({{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql) via playwright browser. Use CodeMirror editor per graphiql-interaction.md. Do NOT use curl. User authenticated via Headers tab.
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password&scope=offline_access&username={{USER_EMAIL}}&password={{USER_PASSWORD}}&storeId={{STORE_ID}} → save bearer token
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click "Headers" button (right tab) → set auth token via execCommand('insertText') on Headers textarea (see graphiql-interaction.md §2 — only step using JS) → take screenshot to verify token visible in Headers panel (not Variables)
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { createOrganization(command: { name: "AT&T Corp. #1" }) { id name } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify valid business name accepted
[ACT] Clear editor → type mutation with XSS payload: mutation { createOrganization(command: { name: "<script>alert(1)</script>Org" }) { id name } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify XSS name rejected
Assertions:
[ERRORS] errors[] empty for valid business name (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] OrganizationNameValidationPattern ^[\p{L}\p{M}\p{N}\s'\-\.&#/,()]+$ permits &, #, digits
[DATA] Organization created with exact business name including &
[ERRORS] errors[] non-empty for XSS payload — validation rejects <, > characters
[DATA] No organization created with script tags in name
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type organization query → execute → valid org exists; XSS org does not
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: Valid business name with & rejected (false positive); XSS payload accepted as org name in response panel; no validation error in errors[]; org created with <script> in name
Cleanup: delete valid test org via admin API

Title: xProfile - createContact Mutation Validates Phone Fields (NewContactValidator)
Preconditions: BROWSER-ONLY: Execute in GraphiQL UI ({{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql) via playwright browser. Use CodeMirror editor per graphiql-interaction.md. Do NOT use curl. User authenticated via Headers tab.
Steps: [AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password&scope=offline_access&username={{USER_EMAIL}}&password={{USER_PASSWORD}}&storeId={{STORE_ID}} → save bearer token [NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql [WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded [ACT] Click "Headers" button (right tab) → set auth token via execCommand('insertText') on Headers textarea (see graphiql-interaction.md §2 — only step using JS) → take screenshot to verify token visible in Headers panel (not Variables) [ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace) [ACT] Type mutation with HTML in phone: mutation { createContact(command: { firstName: "TestPhone" lastName: "Validator" phones: [""] }) { id firstName lastName phones } } [GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter [READ] Read response — verify HTML in phone rejected and no contact created [ACT] Clear editor → type mutation with 65-char phone: mutation { createContact(command: { firstName: "TestPhone" lastName: "MaxLen" phones: ["11111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111"] }) { id phones } } [GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter [READ] Read response — verify 65-char phone rejected by MaxLength(64) [ACT] Clear editor → type mutation with valid phone: mutation { createContact(command: { firstName: "TestPhone" lastName: "Valid" phones: ["+1 (555) 123-4567"] }) { id firstName lastName phones } } [GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter [READ] Read response — verify contact created with valid phone [ACT] Clear editor → type mutation with 64-char phone (boundary): mutation { createContact(command: { firstName: "TestPhone" lastName: "Boundary" phones: ["1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111"] }) { id phones } } [GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter [READ] Read response — verify exactly 64 chars accepted
Assertions: [ERRORS] errors[] non-empty for HTML tag — NewContactValidator.NoHtmlTags() rejects HTML in phones (BL-GQL-001) [DATA] No contact created with HTML phone payload [ERRORS] errors[] non-empty for 65-char phone — NewContactValidator.MaxLength(64) enforced [DATA] No contact created with oversized phone [ERRORS] errors[] empty for valid phone — contact created successfully [DATA] Contact has phones: ["+1 (555) 123-4567"] [ERRORS] errors[] empty for exactly 64-char phone — boundary value accepted [DATA] Contact created with 64-char phone value
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type contact query by ID → execute → phones match created values
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: HTML tags accepted in phone during contact creation; 65-char phone accepted (MaxLength not enforced); valid phone rejected (false positive); 64-char boundary phone rejected; contact created with tag in phone
Cleanup: delete created test contacts via admin API or deleteContact mutation
References: VCST-4803 PR #132 (NewContactValidator: MaxLength 64 + NoHtmlTags on phones)

Title: xProfile - requestRegistration Personal Account Happy Path
Preconditions: BROWSER-ONLY: Execute in GraphiQL UI ({{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql) via playwright browser. Use CodeMirror editor per graphiql-interaction.md. Do NOT use curl. No auth required for registration mutation.
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { requestRegistration(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" contact: { firstName: "AgentTest" lastName: "Registration" } account: { username: "agent-test-reg-TIMESTAMP@test.local" email: "agent-test-reg-TIMESTAMP@test.local" password: "Agent1Test!Reg" } }) { result { succeeded requireEmailVerification errors { code description parameter } } contact { id firstName lastName } account { id username email } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify registration succeeded
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] result.succeeded = true
[DATA] result.errors is null or empty array
[DATA] contact.id is non-empty string
[DATA] contact.firstName = "AgentTest"
[DATA] contact.lastName = "Registration"
[DATA] account.id is non-empty string
[DATA] account.username = test email address
[DATA] account.email = test email address
[DATA] result.requireEmailVerification is boolean (true or false depending on store setting)
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type query: query { me { contact { firstName lastName } } } with auth header from new account → execute → returns registered contact
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; result.succeeded = false; contact.id empty; account.id empty; result.errors contains unexpected error codes; GraphiQL shows error banner
Cleanup: delete registered account via Admin API: DELETE {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/security/users/<username>; delete contact via deleteContact mutation
